data.title: Learn How To Activate iPhone Emergency SOS — As Hurricane Milton Approaches, Your Safety May Depend On It
data.description: Apple's Emergency SOS via satellite feature on iPhone 14 and later models allows users to contact emergency services when outside cellular or Wi-Fi coverage, offering a crucial lifeline in remote or disaster-stricken areas.

data.title: Palantir, Costco, Boeing, Celsius Holdings, And Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average closed nearly 1% higher at 42,512.

data.title: Forget Trump Vs. Harris – Florida's Biggest Election Battle Is Over Cannabis, And It's Costing Millions
data.description: Amendment 3, which seeks to legalize cannabis, has drawn $68 million in ad spending—more than any other political cause on the Florida ballot.

data.title: Alibaba, JD.com, XPeng Soar In Hong Kong As PBOC's Fresh Stimulus To Boost Stock Market Sends Chinese Main Stock Market Gauge Up By 3%
data.description: China's intent to kickstart growth is clearly evident as the PBoC announced Thursday fresh measures to boost the stock market.

data.title: How To Lock Or Hide Apps On Your iPhone For Extra Privacy
data.description: You can lock or hide individual apps on your iPhone using Face ID, Touch ID, or a passcode for added privacy, and easily unlock or remove the lock when needed.
